title: Scroll of harvests
description: Displays detailed information about the tool tiers available in the game, useful when running mods that adds or re-orders tool tiers along with mods that interact those tiers in other ways.
body:
# Description
Displays detailed information about the tool tiers available in the game, useful when running mods that adds or re-orders tool tiers along with mods that interact those tiers in other ways.


Note: Scroll of Harvests uses the [mutil](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutil) library, remember to grab that if you're installing manually.

The tier list can be opened using a button in the player inventory.

Forge mods for 1.18 have a lot of control over tool tiers, how they're ordered and which blocks requires which tiers of tools. It's a powerful system that allows mods a lot of control over how blocks can be harvested, but it can be difficult to understand what's going on without being able to see how things are laid out.

# Modpacks & use
Feel free to use this in modpacks or compilations, but please don't rehost it on other platforms.
 

# Discord
I've got a discord server over here: https://discord.gg/MyjK4Fx, jump on if you have questions, need some help or to get sneak-peeks at upcoming features.

 

# Support and Contributions
Links to the issue tracker and the source is available in the tab bar at the top, feel free to submit bug reports or feature requests over there. PRs are welcome, create an issue first or poke me on discord so we can align before you get started.


I develop and maintain my mods in my spare time, if you enjoy what you've seen so far and want to help me to create more experiences please consider supporting me on patreon.   
[![patreon link](https://c5.patreon.com/external/logo/become_a_patron_button.png)](https://www.patreon.com/mickelus)
